page.title: Account settings
page.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and how we keep you updated.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your personal details, used on your loan application.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Keep your account and loan data protected.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose what we email and text you about.

security.twoFaDesc: Require a code from your phone when signing in.

loanUpdates.label: Loan status updates
loanUpdates.desc: Milestones like application received, in review, and clear to close.

docRequests.label: Document requests
docRequests.desc: When your loan officer needs a new document from you.

esign.label: E-signature requests
esign.desc: When a disclosure or document is ready for your signature.

rateAlerts.label: Rate alerts
rateAlerts.desc: Notify me when rates hit the target on my saved alerts.

marketing.label: Product news & offers
marketing.desc: Occasional updates about new Loan Factory features.

preferences.closeDesc: Permanently delete your account and personal data. Any active loan must be closed first. This cannot be undone.
